# kCFErrorDomainSystemConfiguration

**Global Variable**

A string constant identifying a Core Foundation error domain. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFError] for further information on error domains.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCFErrorDomainSystemConfiguration: CFString
```
title: kCFErrorDomainSystemConfiguration
